name: Global Security Guard # حارس الأمان الشامل
on:
  push:
    branches: [ "main" ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ "main" ]

# Least Privilege: Only read contents by default
permissions:
  contents: read
  actions: read
  checks: read
  security-events: write # Required for CodeQL/Gitleaks reporting if integrated

concurrency:
  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

jobs:
  security-and-build:
    name: "فحص الأمان والجودة"
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 40 # Increased to allow full build and analysis

    steps:
      # 1. جلب الكود من المستودع
      - name: Checkout Code
        uses: actions/checkout@692973e3d937129bcbf40652eb9f2f61becf3332 # pinned for supply-chain security (v4.1.7)
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
          persist-credentials: false

      # 2. حماية مفاتيح الـ API (Secret Scanning)
      - name: Check for Secrets
        uses: gitleaks/gitleaks-action@f699513e707e9c60e6e6676179c5123d53b21696 # pinned for supply-chain security (v2.3.7)
        with:
          report-path: gitleaks-report.json
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
        continue-on-error: true # Not blocking here to allow log capture but we will fail later if needed

      # 3. إعداد البيئة (Flutter/Dart & Java)
      - name: Setup Java
        uses: actions/setup-java@6101fccd36253ad519960aef65049d5010642f06 # pinned for supply-chain security (v4.2.1)
        with:
          distribution: 'zulu'
          java-version: '17'

      - name: Setup Flutter
        uses: subosito/flutter-action@e8b7d90367e91404c0bc60bf977ef2751480c59e # pinned for supply-chain security (v2.23.0)
        with:
          channel: 'stable'
          cache: true

      - name: Cleanup legacy files and isolated environments
        run: rm -rf OpenWrtManager-1.40 luci-mobile-1.1.8 .isolated-env archive

      # 4. بناء تطبيق الأندرويد (APK Build)
      - name: Build Android APK
        run: |
          mkdir -p logs
          echo "[SECTION: ANDROID BUILD]" >> logs/process.log
          flutter build apk --release --obfuscate --split-debug-info=build/debug-info >> logs/process.log 2>&1 || {
            echo "APK_BUILD_FAILED=true" >> $GITHUB_ENV
            echo "Build failed. Check Android logs below." >> logs/process.log
          }

      # 5. Native Security Kill Switch (Grep-based)
      - name: Security Kill Switch
        run: |
          echo -e "\n[SECTION: SECURITY KILL SWITCH]" >> logs/process.log
          KILL_SWITCH=0
          
          # 1. Unsafe TLS / Certificate Bypass
          if grep -rE "badCertificateCallback|allowBadCertificates.*true" lib/; then
            echo "❌ CRITICAL: Unsafe TLS certificate bypass detected!" >> logs/process.log
            KILL_SWITCH=1
          fi
          
          # 2. Hardcoded / Exposed Secrets in print
          if grep -rE "print\(.*token|print\(.*password|debugPrint\(.*token|debugPrint\(.*password" lib/; then
            echo "❌ CRITICAL: Potential secret leakage in print/debugPrint detected!" >> logs/process.log
            KILL_SWITCH=1
          fi
          
          # 3. Unsafe Storage
          if grep -r "SharedPreferences" lib/ && grep -rE "token|password|key" lib/; then
            echo "⚠️ WARNING: Sensitive data might be stored in SharedPreferences instead of SecureStorage." >> logs/process.log
            # Not a kill switch yet, but recorded
          fi

          # 4. Unsafe HTTP
          if grep -r "http://" lib/; then
             echo "❌ CRITICAL: Insecure HTTP protocol detected!" >> logs/process.log
             KILL_SWITCH=1
          fi

          if [ "$KILL_SWITCH" -eq 1 ]; then
            echo "SECURITY_POLICY_VIOLATION=true" >> $GITHUB_ENV
            exit 1
          fi

      # 6. توليد ملف البصمة الرقمية (Artifact Integrity)
      - name: Generate Integrity Manifest
        if: always() && env.APK_BUILD_FAILED != 'true' && env.SECURITY_POLICY_VIOLATION != 'true'
        run: |
          mkdir -p output
          APK_PATH="build/app/outputs/flutter-apk/app-release.apk"
          if [ -f "$APK_PATH" ]; then
            cp "$APK_PATH" output/netguard-pro-release.apk
            SHA256=$(sha256sum output/netguard-pro-release.apk | awk '{print $1}')
            echo "{" > output/manifest.json
            echo "  \"filename\": \"netguard-pro-release.apk\"," >> output/manifest.json
            echo "  \"sha256\": \"$SHA256\"," >> output/manifest.json
            echo "  \"build_timestamp\": \"$(date -u +'%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')\"," >> output/manifest.json
            echo "  \"commit_sha\": \"${{ github.sha }}\"," >> output/manifest.json
            echo "  \"run_id\": \"${{ github.run_id }}\"" >> output/manifest.json
            echo "}" >> output/manifest.json
          fi

      # 7. فحص "جودة الكود" والأمان (Linting & Security)
      - name: Run Quality Checks
        id: checks
        run: |
          EXIT_CODE=0
          
          echo -e "\n[SECTION: DART ANALYZE]" >> logs/process.log
          flutter pub get >> logs/process.log 2>&1
          flutter analyze --no-pub > dart_analyze.out 2>&1 || {
            EXIT_CODE=1
            echo "Dart analysis issues detected." >> logs/process.log
          }
          cat dart_analyze.out >> logs/process.log
          
          echo -e "\n[SECTION: MASS DELETION GUARD]" >> logs/process.log
          # Check for mass deletions in the last commit
          DELETED_COUNT=$(git diff --name-only --diff-filter=D HEAD~1 HEAD | wc -l || echo 0)
          if [ "$DELETED_COUNT" -gt 10 ]; then
            echo "[WARNING] Mass deletion detected ($DELETED_COUNT files). This is recorded for security monitoring." >> logs/process.log
          fi
          
          if [ "$APK_BUILD_FAILED" == "true" ]; then
            EXIT_CODE=1
          fi
          
          exit $EXIT_CODE

      - name: Upload APK
        if: always() && env.APK_BUILD_FAILED != 'true' && env.SECURITY_POLICY_VIOLATION != 'true'
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@0b2256b8c012f0828dc542b3febcab082c67f72b # pinned for supply-chain security (v4.3.4)
        with:
          name: app-release-apk
          path: output/
          retention-days: 3 # Security: Shorter retention for release artifacts in CI

      # 6. معالجة الفشل وتصدير السجل الذكي (Error Context Log)
      - name: Export Error Context Log
        if: always()
        run: |
          # Only run if there was an actual failure in any preceding step
          if [ "${{ job.status }}" == "success" ]; then exit 0; fi
          
          echo "==== 🛡️ NETGUARD SECURITY & ERROR ANALYSIS 🛡️ ====" > error_report.txt
          echo "Generated at: $(date)" >> error_report.txt
          echo "------------------------------------------------" >> error_report.txt
          
          if [ "$SECURITY_POLICY_VIOLATION" == "true" ]; then
            echo -e "\n🛑 [SECURITY POLICY VIOLATION]" >> error_report.txt
            echo "High-risk coding patterns were detected (Unsafe TLS, HTTP, or leakages)." >> error_report.txt
            echo "Production build blocked. Review logs/process.log for exact grep findings." >> error_report.txt
          fi

          if [ "$APK_BUILD_FAILED" == "true" ]; then
            echo -e "\n❌ [CRITICAL: APK BUILD FAILED]" >> error_report.txt
            echo "The Flutter android build failed. Check logs/process.log for compilation errors." >> error_report.txt
          fi
          
          # 1. Process Mass Deletion Errors
          if grep -q "\[FAILURE REASON\] Mass deletion" logs/process.log; then
            echo -e "\n🚨 [SECURITY ALERT: MASS DELETION]" >> error_report.txt
            grep "\[FAILURE REASON\] Mass deletion" logs/process.log | sed 's/\[FAILURE REASON\] //' >> error_report.txt
            echo "Action: Please verify if this deletion was intentional. Security policy blocks deletions > 10 files to prevent sabotage." >> error_report.txt
          fi

          # 2. Process Dart Errors with Code Context
          if [ -f dart_analyze.out ] && grep -qE "error •|warning •" dart_analyze.out; then
            echo -e "\n🛠️ [DART ANALYZE ISSUES]" >> error_report.txt
            # Process all errors/warnings found
            grep -E "error •|warning •" dart_analyze.out | while read -r line; do
              # Extract path:line:col (format: info • message • path:line:col • code)
              # Using a more robust regex-based extraction
              MSG=$(echo "$line" | awk -F' • ' '{print $2}')
              FILE_INFO=$(echo "$line" | awk -F' • ' '{print $3}')
              TYPE=$(echo "$line" | awk -F' • ' '{print $1}' | xargs)
              
              FILE_PATH=$(echo "$FILE_INFO" | cut -d: -f1)
              LINE_NUM=$(echo "$FILE_INFO" | cut -d: -f2)
              COL_NUM=$(echo "$FILE_INFO" | cut -d: -f3)
              
              echo -e "\n[${TYPE^^}] $MSG" >> error_report.txt
              echo "   Location: $FILE_PATH (Line $LINE_NUM, Col $COL_NUM)" >> error_report.txt
              
              if [ -f "$FILE_PATH" ]; then
                echo "   Context:" >> error_report.txt
                # Get 5 lines before and after
                START=$((LINE_NUM > 5 ? LINE_NUM - 5 : 1))
                END=$((LINE_NUM + 5))
                
                # Use a counter to track the current line while reading
                LINE_COUNTER=$START
                sed -n "${START},${END}p" "$FILE_PATH" | while IFS= read -r codeline; do
                  if [ "$LINE_COUNTER" -eq "$LINE_NUM" ]; then
                    printf "    👉 %4d | %s\n" "$LINE_COUNTER" "$codeline" >> error_report.txt
                    # Visual pointer to column (adjusting for the prefix length)
                    POINTER_SPACE=$((COL_NUM + 10))
                    printf "%${POINTER_SPACE}s%s\n" "" "^--- ERROR" >> error_report.txt
                  else
                    printf "       %4d | %s\n" "$LINE_COUNTER" "$codeline" >> error_report.txt
                  fi
                  LINE_COUNTER=$((LINE_COUNTER + 1))
                done
              else
                echo "   (Source code snippet not available)" >> error_report.txt
              fi
            done
          fi

          # 3. Process Gitleaks Security Detections
          if [ -f gitleaks-report.json ]; then
            DETECTIONS=$(grep -c "id" gitleaks-report.json || echo 0)
            if [ "$DETECTIONS" -gt 0 ]; then
               echo -e "\n🔑 [API KEYS / SECRETS DETECTED]" >> error_report.txt
               echo "Security scan found $DETECTIONS potential secrets committed to the repository." >> error_report.txt
               echo "Action: Revoke these keys immediately and remove them from git history using BFG or git-filter-repo." >> error_report.txt
            fi
          fi
          
          # 4. Fallback for other errors
          echo -e "\n🔍 [MISC LOGS]" >> error_report.txt
          grep -iE "error|fail|exception|alert" logs/process.log | grep -v "SECTION:" | head -n 10 >> error_report.txt || echo "No other specific patterns." >> error_report.txt
          
          echo -e "\n------------------------------------------------" >> error_report.txt
          echo "Full logs are archived in GitHub Actions Artifacts." >> error_report.txt

      - name: Upload Logs on Failure
        if: failure()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@0b2256b8c012f0828dc542b3febcab082c67f72b # pinned for supply-chain security (v4.3.4)
        with:
          name: security-and-error-logs
          path: |
            logs/process.log
            error_report.txt
          retention-days: 3

      # 7. إشعار النجاح
      - name: Success Notification
        if: success()
        run: echo "✅ تم فحص الكود وبناء النسخة APK بنجاح."
